creator: freebsd@asdrip.fr
text:
(In reply to Michael Reifenberger from comment #5)
Hi, 
If I'm not mistaken 1.20 is the last release under the "bitwarden_rs" name. The new one 1.21 is indeed under vaultwarden. 
I've just tried building it with the patch, and it does work... Only things I've done with this patch is change version number of web vaults (to 2.19b -before vaultwarden rename) as well as change bitwarden_rs version (to 1.20 -before vaultwarden rename as well [28/03/21]) and then update crates dependencies (very long, I haven't found a way to do it other than make the port and adding the crates at every error -must be a dumb way ^^'-)

Best regards,
Adrien
